subtitle: A 500-metre strip of fine sand and waist-deep turquoise off Ayia Napa, where you wade to a small islet at low tide and a foam machine fires 250 litres a minute by mid-afternoon.
spike_statement: Nissi is named for the islet you can walk to across a shallow sandbar; the beach bar behind it helped turn a fishing village into a clubbing capital.

levers.photo_tone: high-key white sand, saturated shallow turquoise, hard midday light
